2-3 Persimmon trees ripen around the end of Aug with the blackberries. Walk the back for persimmon and back/side edges of soccer fields for black berries. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.

north edge of the fields, beyond soccer goals, 

small grove of medium sized trees that are thin enough to be hand-shaken. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
